---
title: "About"
---

I occasionally research energy-related topics and share a synthesized version of my findings on this website. AI is heavily used in all phases of creating these articles, but I do try to make sure the voice and vision are my own.<br>
Please reach out to me on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ashreeta-prasanna-19163729/) if you would like to get in touch, want further details or are interested in supplementary analysis or information.
